steps.title: Identify the requirement in the goal
steps.content: The student wants to describe how understanding “evolved” — meaning changed from one explanation to another — so the answer must present both the earlier and newer theories in a way that shows the progression between them.

steps.title: Find the choice that shows the progression
steps.content: Choice D uses “but” to present the 2017 grass fire theory followed by new research showing a cometary explosion, making the progression clear and concrete. The other choices either skip one theory (A and C) or mention different theories without specifying what they are (B). This matches choice D — D is correct.
